properties.name: afg.governance.client.auto-register
properties.description: 是否启用配置自动上报

properties.name: afg.governance.client.auto-register-prefixes
properties.description: 自动上报配置前缀列表（支持多个前缀）

properties.name: afg.governance.client.auto-register-overwrite
properties.description: 是否覆盖服务端已有配置

properties.name: afg.governance.client.display-names
properties.description: 配置项中文显示名映射

properties.name: afg.governance.client.signature.secret
properties.description: 签名密钥（至少 32 字符）
